name: Apple Preserves
recipeInstructions:
This is NOT jam. I like to use these warmed as a side dish (like escalloped apples). This is from the Ball Blue Book.
1. Mix apples, water, and lemon juice in a large pot.
2. Simmer covered for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in pectin and bring to full rolling boil, stirring frequently.
4. Add lemon slices and sugar, then bring to full rolling boil again. Boil for an additional minute, stirring frequently.
5. Remove from heat and stir in nutmeg.
6. Pour into hot jars or cool and place into freezer containers. If canning, process for 10 minutes in boiling water bath. Yield: 6 half pints. If freezing, ensure the mixture is cooled first; it will be hot enough to melt plastic!
